title: Death before Breakfast
shortDescription: A clash of armies, a battle of gods, and the rage of a hero fuel this epic tale of war.
description: A clash of armies, a battle of gods, and the rage of a hero fuel this epic tale of war. When a leader's pride ignites a conflict, the greatest warrior withdraws, leaving his comrades to face devastating losses. Explore a world of mighty heroes and bitter rivalries, where courage and honor are tested by fate. Witness the brutal dance of battle, the clash of bronze, and the complex ties that bind even enemies. Can a prophecy alter the course of war, or is destiny set in stone?

title: The Past is Rising
shortDescription: A haunting story about memories that refuse to stay buried.
description: A haunting story about memories that refuse to stay buried. As old secrets resurface, a family must confront the truths they have spent a lifetime avoiding.

title: The Casual Vacancy
shortDescription: A small English town is thrown into turmoil after a sudden death.
description: A small English town is thrown into turmoil after a sudden death on the parish council leaves a vacant seat, exposing rivalries beneath a peaceful surface.

title: The Hogwarts Library Collection
shortDescription: A boxed collection of companion texts from the wizarding world.
description: A boxed collection of companion texts from the wizarding world, gathering the classroom texts referenced throughout the Harry Potter series.

title: Fantastic Beasts: The Original Screenplay
shortDescription: The complete original screenplay from the wizarding world film.
description: The complete original screenplay from the wizarding world film, including scenes and dialogue not seen in the final cut.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
shortDescription: A boy discovers he is a wizard on his eleventh birthday.
description: A boy discovers he is a wizard on his eleventh birthday and is whisked away to a school of magic, where an old evil is stirring once again.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
shortDescription: A dangerous convict escapes, and Harry learns of a hidden family past.
description: A dangerous convict escapes Azkaban prison, and as the wizarding world panics, Harry begins to learn the truth about his own family history.

title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
shortDescription: The complete screenplay for the second Fantastic Beasts film.
description: The complete screenplay for the second Fantastic Beasts film, following the escalating war between Grindelwald and those who oppose him.

title: The Ickabog
shortDescription: A fairy tale about a mythical monster and a kingdom built on lies.
description: A fairy tale about a mythical monster said to roam a distant land, and the kingdom that lets fear reshape the truth.

title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
shortDescription: The illustrated edition of the story that started it all.
description: The illustrated edition of the story that started it all, bringing Hogwarts to life in full color for a new generation of readers.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
shortDescription: Something has been petrifying students, and Harry must find out who.
description: Something has been petrifying students at Hogwarts, and whispers of an ancient chamber grow louder with every attack.

title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
shortDescription: A secret resistance forms as the Ministry denies a growing threat.
description: A secret resistance forms as the Ministry of Magic denies a growing threat, and Harry must learn to lead in the shadows.

title: A Million to One
shortDescription: An underdog's gamble that changes everything.
description: An underdog's high-stakes gamble sets off a chain of events that changes the course of an entire family's future.

title: The Richest Man in Babylon
shortDescription: Timeless money lessons told through ancient parables.
description: Timeless money lessons told through ancient Babylonian parables about saving, investing, and building lasting wealth.

title: Letting Go of the Throne
shortDescription: A meditation on power, legacy, and what we leave behind.
description: A quiet, lyrical meditation on power, legacy, and what a family leaves behind when its throne finally falls.

title: A Girl Named Harper
shortDescription: A coming-of-age mystery set across two continents.
description: A coming-of-age mystery set across two continents, following a girl piecing together a family secret decades in the making.

title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer
shortDescription: A mischievous boy's adventures along the Mississippi River.
description: A mischievous boy's adventures along the Mississippi River, full of schemes, friendship, and small-town charm.

title: The Art of War
shortDescription: Ancient strategy that still shapes modern thinking.
description: Ancient military strategy that continues to shape modern thinking on leadership, competition, and conflict.

title: The Chandos Tom Sawyer
shortDescription: A classic tale of mistaken identity and love.
description: A classic tale of mistaken identity, love, and comic misadventure set across a single midsummer night.

title: The Past is Rising
shortDescription: Old secrets surface when a body is found in a quiet village.
description: Old secrets surface when a body is found in a quiet village, and a detective must untangle decades of silence.

title: What Is This Grief
shortDescription: A raw, honest exploration of loss and healing.
description: A raw, honest exploration of loss, memory, and the slow, uneven work of healing.

title: Why Women Don't Talk Money
shortDescription: Unpacking the silence around women and personal finance.
description: Unpacking the cultural silence around women and personal finance, and what changes when the conversation opens up.

title: The Rules We Live By
shortDescription: An honest look at the unwritten rules that shape our choices.
description: An honest, funny look at the unwritten rules that quietly shape our biggest life choices.

title: Sleeping Volcano
shortDescription: A dormant threat stirs beneath a peaceful nation.
description: A dormant threat stirs beneath a peaceful nation, testing loyalty, science, and survival.

title: Indian Polity
shortDescription: A comprehensive guide to India's constitution and governance.
description: A comprehensive, exam-ready guide to India's constitution, governance, and political institutions.

title: UPSC Complete Guide
shortDescription: A structured roadmap for civil services aspirants.
description: A structured roadmap for civil services aspirants, covering prelims, mains, and interview preparation.

title: Physics Fundamentals
shortDescription: Core physics concepts explained simply.
description: Core physics concepts explained simply, with worked examples for high school and early college readers.

title: Learn English in 30 Days
shortDescription: A practical, everyday approach to English fluency.
description: A practical, everyday approach to English fluency, built around real conversations rather than grammar drills.

title: The Second Business Book
shortDescription: Lessons from founders who built past their first success.
description: Lessons from founders who built past their first success, and what changed the second time around.

description: A field guide for first-time Indian entrepreneurs, from registration to first revenue.

shortDescription: How Indian companies win in competitive markets.
description: How Indian companies win in competitive markets, told through case studies across industries.

title: Tech Dot Com
shortDescription: The story of the internet's first great boom and bust.
description: The story of the internet's first great boom and bust, and what it still teaches builders today.

title: Web Technology
shortDescription: A friendly introduction to how the modern web works.
description: A friendly introduction to how the modern web works, from browsers to servers to the cloud.

title: ChatGPT for Beginners
shortDescription: A plain-language guide to getting started with AI tools.
description: A plain-language guide to getting started with AI tools, written for readers with no technical background.

title: AI and ChatGPT in Education
shortDescription: How classrooms are adapting to generative AI.
description: How classrooms are adapting to generative AI, with practical frameworks for teachers and students.

title: Tales from India
shortDescription: A collection of folk stories passed down through generations.
description: A collection of folk stories passed down through generations, retold for modern readers.

title: Poet Empress
shortDescription: A fictionalized life of a forgotten royal poet.
description: A fictionalized life of a forgotten royal poet whose verses outlasted her empire.
